Lost Worlds

Avalon: Arthurian Island, Healing, and the Legend of the Place Beyond Reach

A source-aware Kyunolab record tracing the Arthurian island associated with healing, departure, and the suspended return of a king.

Avalon: Island of Apples, Arthur’s Rest, and the Lost Place Beyond the Water

Avalon is a pre-existing Lost Worlds subject built around the Arthurian island or otherworldly place associated with healing, apples, and the final resting place of King Arthur.

City of Ys: Sunken Breton City, Flooded Gates, and the Kingdom Beneath the Sea

City of Ys is a pre-existing Lost Worlds subject built around the Breton legend of a city swallowed by the sea after gates, pride, or betrayal allow the water in.

Lost Worlds - Sunken City Legend - 9 min read - Updated Jul 21, 2026
Lost Worlds

El Dorado: Golden Ruler, Lost City Search, and the World Made From a Rumor of Gold

El Dorado is a pre-existing Lost Worlds subject built around the South American legend that shifted from a gilded ruler ritual into European searches for a golden city or kingdom.

Lost Worlds - Golden City Legend - 9 min read - Updated Jul 21, 2026

El Dorado: Origin, Gold, and the Lost City Legend That Changed Maps

A source-aware Kyunolab record tracing the gold-laden legend that moved from ritual and ruler to city, kingdom, and colonial search fantasy.

Lost Worlds - Golden City - 9 min read - Updated Jul 12, 2026

Hy-Brasil Legendary Island: The Vanishing Land on Old Atlantic Maps

Hy-Brasil is a legendary island often placed west of Ireland on old maps and described as difficult or impossible to reach.

Lost Worlds - Vanishing Island - 9 min read - Updated Jul 20, 2026

Hy-Brasil: The Island That Stayed on the Map After It Vanished

A legendary island west of Ireland appearing on maps, then slipping back into fog.

Hyperborea: The Blessed Northern Land, Greek Geography, and a World Beyond the Wind

Hyperborea is a pre-existing Lost Worlds subject built around the Greek idea of a far northern land beyond Boreas where blessed people lived outside ordinary hardship.

Kitezh: Hidden City, Lake Svetloyar, and the Legend That Vanished From Invaders

Kitezh is a pre-existing Lost Worlds subject built around the Russian legend of a city hidden beneath or beyond Lake Svetloyar after disappearing from invading forces.

Lost Worlds - Hidden City Legend - 9 min read - Updated Jul 21, 2026

Lemuria: Science, Theosophy, and the Lost Continent That Became Myth

A source-aware Kyunolab record tracing the proposed lost land bridge that moved from scientific hypothesis into esoteric and pop-cultural lost-world lore.

Lost Worlds - Lost Continent - 10 min read - Updated Jul 12, 2026
Lost Worlds

Lyonesse Lost Land Legend: The Drowned Kingdom at the Edge of Arthurian Memory

Lyonesse is a legendary lost land often placed off the coast of Cornwall. Later tradition connects it with drowned kingdoms, coastal memory, and Arthurian material.

Lost Worlds - Drowned Land Legend - 9 min read - Updated Jul 19, 2026
Lost Worlds

Mu Lost Continent: James Churchward, Occult Geography, and the Pacific Atlantis

Mu is a lost-continent legend popularized by James Churchward in the early 20th century. He claimed that a vanished Pacific civilization was the motherland of humanity, but the story belongs to occult geography and pseudoarchaeology rather than accepted history.

Lost Worlds - Lost Continent - 9 min read - Updated Jul 19, 2026
